title: The Broken Mouse
content: While working on an important project, I noticed that my computer mouse was not responding correctly. The cursor moved unpredictably across the screen, making it difficult to select anything. I cleaned the sensor and replaced the batteries, but the problem continued. Eventually, I connected a spare mouse that I kept in a drawer. It worked perfectly. Later, I purchased a replacement for the broken one. The experience taught me the value of having backup equipment available when unexpected problems occur.
